messages.content:
You are a HoloVerify worker. Preserve state. Obey Gov.
Workers receive Gov twice: a routing lens near the top and the full latest baton near the end.
Source context is ground truth. The state brief preserves continuity. The final baton controls the next action.
Return only valid JSON. No markdown fences.

prompt_object.current_turn_command: Act under the baton. Return compact JSON only. If state and Gov conflict, flag the conflict in open_blockers.

blocked_moves: treating WARN-UMA-075 as execution authority instead of advisory warning
treating REQ-UMA-075 planning artifact as substitute for BG-UMA-075 execution approval
claiming allow verdict despite open source boundary
resolving audit-control assignment by inference rather than exact source record
bypassing BG-UMA-075 requirement based on breakglass exception alone
dependency_ledger: Open dependency: audit-control assignment must be confirmed in exact source record before source boundary can close. Standard-control vs breakglass authorization tension resolved by worker: breakglass covers admin enablement but not pending audit-control requirement. No other dependencies unresolved.
must_preserve: exact source doc_ids from artifact registry
escalation verdict when source boundary is open
must_repair: source boundary to achieve exact match for emergency admin enablement completion

next_worker_baton.attack_focus: Probe for audit-control assignment completion or alternative authoritative source. Verify that next worker does not treat WARN-UMA-075 as execution authority or REQ-UMA-075 as BG-UMA-075 substitute. Confirm exact source boundary match for all five policy elements per STD-UMA-075-P.
monotonic_preservation: user Leena Park, system UMA-ERP, privilege breakglass-admin, time window 13:00-14:00
escalation verdict with open blocker identified
next_worker_baton.objective: Resolve the pending audit-control assignment blocker by locating exact source record confirming audit-control assignment status for Leena Park, UMA-ERP, breakglass-admin, 13:00-14:00 window. Verify whether assignment is now complete or requires additional authorization.
required_repairs: Locate exact source record confirming audit-control assignment status
Verify whether pending status has been resolved
Confirm BG-UMA-075 updated to show audit-control assignment complete
Ensure no adjacent source treated as exact match substitute

full_latest_gov_baton.source_gate_interpretation: Worker output correctly escalated. Gate passed. Source boundary remains open due to pending audit-control assignment in BG-UMA-075 against STD-UMA-075-P exact-match requirement. No gate failures to repair. Must route next worker to resolve open blocker.

gov_routing_lens.blocked_move: treating WARN-UMA-075 as execution authority instead of advisory warning
gov_routing_lens.unresolved_dependency: Open dependency: audit-control assignment must be confirmed in exact source record before source boundary can close. Standard-control vs breakglass authorization tension resolved by worker: breakglass covers admin enablement but not pending audit-control requirement. No other dependencies unresolved.

boundary_binding.action_boundary: May IAM execute the emergency admin enablement?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No exact match; BG-UMA-075 leaves audit-control assignment pending against STD-UMA-075-P requirement
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: STD-UMA-075-P requires audit-control assignment complete in breakglass approval
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Narrow defect remains open: audit-control assignment pending before enablement
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Time window and user match but authority incomplete per policy

worker_output.final_answer: ESCALATE. BG-UMA-075 states audit-control assignment remains pending. STD-UMA-075-P requires this assignment to match before enablement completes. Source boundary therefore stays open. IAM may not execute until defect resolved by exact controlling source record.

internal_documents.content: Request REQ-UMA-075 enables emergency admin for user Leena Park on UMA-ERP, privilege breakglass-admin, time window 13:00-14:00.
Standard-admin warning WARN-UMA-075 says admin access normally requires committee review unless breakglass approval covers the full action.
Breakglass execution approval BG-UMA-075 covers Leena Park, UMA-ERP, breakglass-admin, 13:00-14:00; audit-control assignment remains pending.

policy_documents.content: Emergency admin enablement is complete only when breakglass execution approval matches user, system, privilege, time window, and audit-control assignment before enablement.
policy_documents.title: Exact source-boundary policy
